data.title: [7eb8-af48] GREEN: Implement .claude/hooks/pre-commit/check-plugin-self-ref.sh
data.description:
## What to do
Create .claude/hooks/pre-commit/check-plugin-self-ref.sh — pre-commit hook that blocks commits introducing plugins/dso self-references into the plugin tree.

## Hook behavior

```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# check-plugin-self-ref.sh — blocks plugins/dso self-refs in staged files under plugins/dso/
# This hook lives in .claude/hooks/ (not plugins/dso/), so it may contain plugins/dso in its grep pattern.

set -euo pipefail

VIOLATIONS=()
while IFS= read -r staged_file; do
  # Only scan files under plugins/dso/
  [[ "$staged_file" == plugins/dso/* ]] || continue
  [[ -f "$staged_file" ]] || continue  # skip deletions
  
  # Find lines with plugins/dso that are NOT annotated with plugin-self-ref-ok
  while IFS= read -r match; do
    VIOLATIONS+=("$match")
  done < <(grep -n "plugins/dso" "$staged_file" | grep -v "plugin-self-ref-ok" || true)
done < <(git diff --cached --name-only)

if [ ${#VIOLATIONS[@]} -gt 0 ]; then
  echo "ERROR: plugins/dso self-references found in staged files:"
  printf "  %s\n" "${VIOLATIONS[@]}"
  echo ""
  echo "Fix: Add  # plugin-self-ref-ok: <reason>  to each line, or use \${_PLUGIN_ROOT}/ instead."
  exit 1
fi
```

## Files to create
- .claude/hooks/pre-commit/check-plugin-self-ref.sh (chmod +x required)

## Register in hook dispatcher
Check plugins/dso/hooks/dispatchers/pre-commit.sh — add check-plugin-self-ref.sh to the dispatch list if not auto-discovered.

## testing_mode: GREEN
